objective: OpenSSL lacks RISC-V vector SHA1 assembly. Build config already has -march=rv64gcv_zvkned but without SHA1 vector assembly, the C compiler cannot auto-vectorize SHA1's complex round dependencies and message scheduling.

changes.rationale: OpenSSL lacks RISC-V vector SHA1 assembly. Build config already has -march=rv64gcv_zvkned but without SHA1 vector assembly, the C compiler cannot auto-vectorize SHA1's complex round dependencies and message scheduling.
instructions: 做出最小的、保持行为不变的性能修复，以解决 RootCauseBlueprint 指出的根因。
避免无关重构和格式噪音。

expectedDiffSummary: 候选补丁应通过聚焦修改 crypto/sha/asm/sha1-riscv64-zvknha.pl, crypto/sha/build.info 来解决 blueprint diag-20260610-001。
